title: Shri Katyayani Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Katyayani Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Katyayani.
description:
Jai Jai Ambe Jai Katyayani,
Jai Jag Mata jag ki Maharani.
Baijnath sthan tumhara,
Vahan vardati naam pukara॥
॥ Jai Katyayani Mata ॥

Kayi naam hain kayi dham hain,
Yeh sthan bhi to sukhdham hai.
Har mandir mein jyot tumhari,
Kahi Yogeshwari mahima nyari॥
॥ Jai Katyayani Mata ॥

Har jagah utsav hote rehte,
Har mandir mein bhagat hai kehte.
Katyayani rakshak kaya ki,
Granthi kaate moh maya ki॥
॥ Jai Katyayani Mata ॥

Jhoothe moh se chudane wali,
Apna naam japane wali.
Brihaspativaar ko puja kariye,
Dhyan Katyayani ka dhariye॥
॥ Jai Katyayani Mata ॥

Har sankat ko door karegi,
Bhandare bharpoor karegi.
Jo bhi Maa ko bhakt pukare,
Katyayani sab kasht nivare॥
॥ Jai Katyayani Mata ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Maa Katyayani's Aarti?
faq.a1: Maa Katyayani is known as the 'Goddess of War' and 'Goddess of Marriage'. Her Aarti helps in removing obstacles related to marriage and provides victory over enemies.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for her worship?
faq.a2: The sixth day of Navratri (Shashthi) is dedicated to Maa Katyayani and is considered the most auspicious for her worship and Aarti.
faq.q3: What offering (Prasad) is preferred for Mother Katyayani during Aarti?
faq.a3: Offering honey is considered highly auspicious and is very dear to Maa Katyayani.
faq.q4: Can her Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it can be performed with full devotion and proper rituals in the home temple on the sixth day of Navratri.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti?
faq.a5: Chanting 'Om Devi Katyayanyai Namah' after the Aarti is very effective for mental peace and the fulfillment of desires.
